title: Bipolar & Lithium Mastery
content:
• Dx: Manic Episode: Sleeping little (>1wk), pressured speech, risky behavior[span_10](end_span).
• Risk: Lithium Toxicity: Precipitated by NSAIDs. [span_11](start_span)Use Aspirin instead[span_11](end_span).
• Tx: Fluid resuscitation; [span_12](start_span)Dialysis if Level >4[span_12](end_span).

title: Personality Clusters Mnemonics
content:
• Cluster A (Weird): Paranoid (Accusatory), Schizoid (Aloof), Schizotypal (Awkward)[span_13](end_span)[span_14](start_span).
• Cluster B (Wild): Antisocial (Bad), Borderline (Instability), Histrionic (flamBoyant)[span_14](end_span)[span_15](start_span).
• Cluster C (Worried): Avoidant (Cowardly), OCPD (Compulsive)[span_15](end_span).

title: APGAR & Birth Injuries
content:
• Dx: APGAR: 1 min (labor tolerance), 5 min (resuscitation response). [span_16](start_span)Does NOT predict neuro outcome[span_16](end_span)[span_17](start_span).
• Dx: Erb-Duchenne (C5-C6): Medially rotated arm (Waiters tip)[span_17](end_span)[span_18](start_span).
• Tx: Clavicular Fracture: No tx needed; callus forms in 1wk[span_18](end_span).

title: Consent & Capacity
content:
• Rule: Adult Refusal: Do not override a capable adult even if life-saving[span_19](end_span)[span_20](start_span).
• Rule: Mature Minor: Consent is capacity-based, not age-based in Canada[span_20](end_span)[span_21](start_span).
• Risk: Child Abuse: Report immediately on suspicion; do not investigate alone[span_21](end_span).
